3323180.name: Cat Nap
3323180.description:
Cat Nap is a cozy and relaxing tower defense game where your cats protect the sanctity of your sleep.

You can hire your cats by spending cat treats to place them in strategically advantageous positions throughout your room. When night breaks and you go to sleep, your cats will try to protect your slumbering from all the different threats that might arise during the night. You can even give your cats additional treats to improve the ferocity they will fight with by selecting a cat tower of the same type and placing it on an existing one.
3323180.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
